Introducing Mattel Brick Shop
Iconic cars built with authentic details.

Prepare for the battle of Eternia
Thrill fans of all ages with Masters of the Universe toys, inspired by the new film. Our epic must-haves are ready for adventure, so bring home the power of Grayskull today!

Challenge Accepted
By igniting the challenger spirit, Hot Wheels unleashes creativity, expands imagination and teaches problem-solving skills, so there's no limit to how far kids can go!

#MattelLovesLAMattel is committed to the city we call home. By purchasing a #MattelLovesLA t-shirt, you're supporting the American Red Cross, bringing help and hope to those impacted by the wildfires.
